facebook.caption:
28,937 reviews. 4.9 stars. At a resort with 1,399 rooms.

Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc sits right on Bãi Dài, one of the longest stretches of beach on the island. Full water park, multiple restaurants, bars, and suites that actually look like the photos.

This is the benchmark other Phu Quoc resorts get compared to. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Water park, beachfront suites, 4.9 stars across nearly 29,000 reviews. Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc on Bãi Dài is not subtle about what it is. Walk the grounds once and you'll get it.

instagram.caption:
28,937 reviews. 4.9 stars. One resort on Bãi Dài.

Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc sets the bar. Tag your travel buddy.
